# Functional Programming in Elixir — course map (/elixir)

> A bridge from the algebra you already know to real-time apps on the BEAM. Six chapters, fifty-four modules, interactive and runnable throughout.

Per-chapter maps for LLMs/agents. Each chapter has its own llms.txt listing every lesson; this index links the chapters in course order.

## Chapters

- [Course contents — History](/elixir/course) — map: [/elixir/course/llms.txt](/elixir/course/llms.txt): The full map of the course — six chapters and an optional history — plus an onramp for engineers arriving from C# and .NET, comparing the CLR and the…
- [F1 · Algebra](/elixir/algebra) — map: [/elixir/algebra/llms.txt](/elixir/algebra/llms.txt): Chapter F1 Algebra — the opening chapter of Functional Programming in Elixir. Nine lessons showing that the algebra you know (functions…
- [F2 · Functional Programming](/elixir/functional) — map: [/elixir/functional/llms.txt](/elixir/functional/llms.txt): The Functional Programming chapter: pure functions, persistent data, higher-order functions, folds, closures, and composition — a guided path through…
- [The Elixir Language — F3](/elixir/language) — map: [/elixir/language/llms.txt](/elixir/language/llms.txt): The chapter that grounds the functional ideas of F2 in real Elixir: values and IEx, pattern matching, modules, enumerables and streams, structs…
- [Algorithms & Data Structures — F4](/elixir/algorithms) — map: [/elixir/algorithms/llms.txt](/elixir/algorithms/llms.txt): The F4 chapter overview: nine modules from lists through trees, sorting, and hash-based maps to the persistent trie family — HAMT, CHAMP, and the…
- [Pragmatic Programming — F5](/elixir/pragmatic) — map: [/elixir/pragmatic/llms.txt](/elixir/pragmatic/llms.txt): The F5 chapter overview: a pragmatic build of the Portal engine in Elixir. Nine modules carry one product from a decoupled core through domain…
- [Phoenix Framework — F6](/elixir/phoenix) — map: [/elixir/phoenix/llms.txt](/elixir/phoenix/llms.txt): The F6 chapter overview: building a real, real-time learning platform on top of the F5 Portal engine. Nine modules add a Phoenix web layer over the…
